ddls:
CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "timestamp_desc" TEXT /* Description of the timestamp (e.g., Content Modification Time) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the log */,
  "source_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the log source */,
  "message" TEXT /* Log message content */,
  "parser_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parser used for the log */,
  "display_name" TEXT /* Display name of the log file */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag for additional metadata */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the source where the log was generated */,
  "hostname" TEXT /* Hostname of the source where the log was generated */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the log entry (e.g., INFO, ERROR, WARNING) */,
  "facility" TEXT /* Facility or subsystem that generated the log (e.g., kernel, user-level) */,
  "application" TEXT /* Name of the application that generated the log */,
  "log_format" TEXT /* Format of the log entry (e.g., JSON, Syslog) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_parser_id FOREIGN KEY ("parser_id") REFERENCES parsers ("parser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the log source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the log source (e.g., Log File, Cron log) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the log source */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the log source */,
  "source_hostname" TEXT /* Hostname of the log source */,
  "source_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the log source is located (e.g., production, development) */,
  "source_location" TEXT /* Physical or logical location of the log source */,
  "source_version" TEXT /* Version of the log source software */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parsers" (
  "parser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parser */,
  "parser_name" TEXT /* Name of the parser */,
  "parser_type" TEXT /* Type of the parser (e.g., text/syslog_traditional) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parser */,
  "parser_version" TEXT /* Version of the parser */,
  "parser_author" TEXT /* Author of the parser */,
  "parser_last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the parser was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log file */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the log file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the log file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the log file for integrity verification */,
  "file_compression_type" TEXT /* Type of compression used for the log file (e.g., gzip, bz2) */,
  "file_checksum_algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the checksum (e.g., MD5, SHA-256) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_files_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, auditor) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "user_created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, disabled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the log entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the access */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES logs ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log entry that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alert_assigned_to" INTEGER /* User ID of the user assigned to resolve the alert */,
  "alert_resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "alert_resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_alert_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("alert_assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert rule */,
  "log_pattern" TEXT /* Pattern in log content that triggers the rule */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "rule_created_date" TEXT /* Date when the rule was created */,
  "rule_last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the rule was last modified */,
  "rule_author" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_searches" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query used */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date when the search was performed */,
  "result_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned */,
  "search_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the search was made */,
  "search_duration" REAL /* Duration of the search query */,
  "search_results" TEXT /* Detailed results of the search query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_searches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_correlations" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log correlation */,
  "log_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first log entry in the correlation */,
  "log_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second log entry in the correlation */,
  "correlation_type" TEXT /* Type of the correlation (e.g., related, identical) */,
  "correlation_description" TEXT /* Description of the correlation */,
  "correlation_score" REAL /* Score indicating the strength of the correlation */,
  "correlation_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the correlation (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_correlations_log_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("log_id_1") REFERENCES logs ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_correlations_log_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("log_id_2") REFERENCES logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_retention_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log retention policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the retention policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the retention policy */,
  "retention_period" TEXT /* Period for which logs should be retained (e.g., 30 days, 6 months) */,
  "retention_action" TEXT /* Action to take after the retention period (e.g., delete, archive) */,
  "policy_created_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy was created */,
  "policy_last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the policy was last modified */,
  "policy_author" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_retention_policies_policy_author FOREIGN KEY ("policy_author") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_retention_policy_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retention policy assignment */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log source assigned the policy */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the retention policy */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy was assigned */,
  "assignment_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment was last modified */,
  "assignment_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_retention_policy_assignments_assignment_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_retention_policy_assignments_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES log_retention_policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_retention_policy_assignments_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)
